headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录254篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究177篇, 开源项目35篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（78篇）。其中14%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ multica-ai /andrej-karpathy-skills：A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations

▸ dotnet /skills：Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

▸ obra /superpowers：An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

▸ HKUDS /CLI-Anything："CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub:https://clianything.cc/

▸ ChromeDevTools /chrome-devtools-mcp：Chrome DevTools for coding agents
text: 今日共收录254篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究177篇, 开源项目35篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（78篇）。其中14%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
